name: compression
description: Compress long conversation context while preserving key decisions

config.description: Split messages into old (to compress) and recent (to keep verbatim)

config.system_prompt: Compress this conversation while preserving ALL decisions and their rationale. Drop verbose tool outputs and debugging loops. Keep the essential reasoning chain.
config.prompt_template:
Compress the following conversation turns into a concise summary that preserves decisions, rationale, and key facts:

{{old_messages}}
